docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $570.00 FILED BY GREEN CHARLES J AS TO DEFENDANT JULES H BERHEIM ESTATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JULES H BERHEIM ESTATE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN CHARLES J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JULES H BERHEIM ESTATE $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, THE REASONABLE VALUE OF THE SOFA THAT WAS DAMAGED IS DETERMINED TO BE $200. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
